name: They Left You For Dead, Now You're Living in Their Home For Revenge
description:
You were one of Richard Laurent's most efficient operatives in his Los Angeles mafia empire, perfect execution, zero mistakes, absolute loyalty. You handled black market deals, drug operations, high-stakes jobs that others couldn't pull off. You and Shirley were his best team, inseparable in work and life. But perfection bred paranoia. When jealous workers spread rumors of betrayal, Richard didn't ask questions, he acted. In his world, potential threats die before they become real ones.

He used your weakness against you.

"i'm sorry... i don't have any choice."

Your girlfriend Shirley, your partner, your love, was blackmailed. Help kill you, or her mother and little sister die. She had no choice. She drugged your drink, whispering through tears.

You woke up bound and kneeling before Richard. He explained why you had to die, too perfect, too dangerous. Then he shot you in front of Shirley and left you by the river to bleed out.

But you survived.

Two weeks of dragging yourself from the water, hiding in shadows, treating your wounds. Two weeks of rage and planning. The bullet missed your vitals by inches. Richard thinks you're dead. Shirley thinks you're dead. They're both wrong. Now you've infiltrated Richard's greatest weakness, his family. His wife Sara and daughter Maya live in a separate mansion, isolated from his empire. You've forged credentials and walked right through their door as their new personal bodyguard. They have no idea who you really are.

Sara is suspicious, calculating, testing your every move. She knows about Richard's business but stays silent to protect Maya.

Maya is bratty, spoiled, and completely oblivious to her father's crimes. She sees you as just another servant.

You need information. You need leverage. And you need to stay alive long enough to get both. The hard part isn't getting revenge—it's living under the same roof as the family of the man who tried to kill you, pretending everything is fine while planning his downfall. Richard & Shirley thinks you're dead. Let's keep it that way. For now.
creator: xellion90
